title: Tool registration requires 5-7 touch points across 3 builders
proof: Adding a tool requires new AgentTool impl + registration in 3 builder functions (build_print_tool_registry, build_tui_tool_registry, build_mcp_tool_registry) at registry.rs:623-928, each with 2 call sites.
counterevidence: AgentTool trait has sensible defaults for most methods. Duplication is structural.
recommended_action: Declarative registration macro or ToolRegistryBuilder. See R01.

title: Permission facet construction duplicated across 16 files (31 implementations)
counterevidence: Each profile is semantically distinct. Duplication is in construction pattern.

title: scheduler.rs is 3,230 lines
counterevidence: Cohesive responsibility. Change frequency proportional to SF100-SF102 features.

title: clippy --all-targets: 806 lint warnings (predominantly test-target)
proof: cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --locked: exit 0, 806 warning headers. The normal production gate cargo clippy --workspace --locked -- -D warnings is clean. The dominant observed lint family is unwrap_used in test modules; this audit does not assert an exact warning-by-source classification. With -D warnings: exit 101 (expected; compilation halts).
counterevidence: The production Clippy gate is clean; all-target warning provenance was not exhaustively classified.
recommended_action: Test cleanup pass before adopting --all-targets in CI.
disposition_detail: Trigger: CI adopts --all-targets or test cleanup sprint.

title: openai_sse.rs is 2,197 lines
disposition_detail: Trigger: new protocol variant or >3000 lines.

title: 9 await_holding_lock warnings in test code
proof: All in test functions using unsafe env::set_var + .await.
disposition_detail: Trigger: safe env-var isolation API in Rust.

title: talos-core purity (0 deps, 1,903 non-test LOC, 61 public items)
proof: Item-scoped cfg(test) method: total 2730, non-test 1903, cfg-test 827.

title: native/panic-boundary containment: 5 uncovered assessments
proof: Matrix: (1) gix in talos-tools/git.rs:36-59 has no unwind containment. (2) arborium in talos-tools/symbol.rs:314,441,541,662 has no unwind containment. (3) rusqlite in 5 crates has no documented boundary containment. (4) zstd in 2 crates has no documented boundary containment. (5) libc setrlimit in talos-sandbox/hardening.rs:289,305,321 has return-code propagation but no ADR-007 policy reconciling AGENTS.md #9. Covered: gix-tui, wasmtime, arborium-tui, grep-searcher, agent-session.
counterevidence: Normal SQLite/zstd failures return Result; setrlimit returns an OS error. catch_unwind does not catch C-level SIGABRT/SIGSEGV and cannot alone contain a process abort.
recommended_action: R03a (tools gix+arborium), R03b (SQLite+zstd), R03c (ADR-007 policy decision plus sandbox security review). All Proposed, not Ready.

title: Provider config-only extension for compatible APIs
4 production unsafe (ADR-007); ADR-018 code removed
proof: 4 unsafe blocks in hardening.rs:258,289,305,321 (env::remove_var + 3x libc::setrlimit). ADR-018 job_control source file no longer exists.
counterevidence: All ADR-007 governed with SAFETY comments.
recommended_action: Reconcile ADR-018. R03c separately requires ADR-007 boundary-policy reconciliation before declaring the libc sites compliant with AGENTS.md #9.
